      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AUTO_STEERING_WHEEL_HEAT_SWITCH
      auto start steering wheel heating on/off setting 方向盘自动加热开关设置 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type true 开 false 关 wangyang.xin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:20:17
      static int CIRCULATION
      air circulation mode 空调空气循环模式 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IHvac.CirculationMode property type wangyang.xin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 15:07:02
      static int DIRECTION_MODE
      climate blowing direction mode 电子出风口风向模式风口模式 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IHvac.DirectionMode property type wangyang.xin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-21 14:57:03
      static int ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_DIRECTION_ADJUST
      Electric air outlet direction adjustment for air conditioner 空调电动出风口方向调节(原adaptApi接口HVAC_FUNC_ELECTRICAL_AIR_VENT_POS) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer[] property type 三个值。第一个代表x轴横向位置坐标；第二个代表y轴纵向位置坐标；第三个代表z轴位置坐标； jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-30 17:40:57
      static int ELECTRONIC_AIR_OUTLET_SWITCH
      Electronic air outlet switch 空调电动出风口开关(原adaptApi接口HVAC_FUNC_ELECTRICAL_AIR_VENT)（FlymeAuto实现指用户主动的开关操作，并非指实车出风口是否出风） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-09-30 17:36:18
      static int FAN_SPEED_INCREMENTAL_ADJUST
      Fan speed incremental adjustment 空调风扇速度风量相对调节/增量调节 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 0 减；1 加 wangyang.xin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 14:40:22
      static int HVAC_AIR_FRAGRANCE_SLOT
      The setting to select(active) fragrance slot 选择并启动具体的香氛槽 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IHvac.AirFragranceSlot property type jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-22 15:15:41
      static int TEMPERATURE_INCREMENTAL_ADJUST
      temperature incremental adjust 温度相对调节/增量调节 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_SEAT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 0 减；1 加 wangyang.xin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 14:38:10
